FlavourText.original:
"The heart is the herald.
It will tell me when it is best to strike."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
FlavourText.zh_cn:
“心脏是最佳传令官，
让我知道何时该出击迎战。”
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里
FlavourText.zh_tw:
「心臟是最佳傳令官，
讓我知道何時該出擊迎戰。」
- 瓦爾女王阿茲里

group.original: {0}% increased [Critical Hit Chance|Critical Hit Chance] if you haven't dealt a Critical Hit [Recently|Recently]

translation.zh_cn: 若你[Recently|近期]内没有打出暴击，则[Critical Hit Chance|暴击率]提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 若你[Recently|近期]未造成暴擊，增加 {0}% [Critical Hit Chance|暴擊率]
